---
title: "AI Ethics Hackathon"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Developing Responsible AI Systems"
description: "Register for the AI Ethics Hackathon on July 18-19, 2026 in Bucharest, a weekend event focused on building responsible AI systems."
date: "2026-07-18"
enddate: "2026-07-19"
location: "Cyber Campus, Bucharest"
category: "hackathon"
status: "new"
image: "/assets/images/ai-ethics.jpg"
registration_date: "2026-05-15"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:50vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Hackathon</div>
    <h1>AI Ethics Hackathon</h1>
    <p>Developing Responsible AI Systems</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center;">
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-calendar3 me-1"></i>July 18-19, 2026</span>
      <span style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15); padding:0.4rem 1rem; border-radius:99px; font-size:0.85rem;"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt me-1"></i>Cyber Campus, Bucharest</span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Register Now</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS BAR -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn">80</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">2</div><div class="m-nl">Days</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">5</div><div class="m-nl">Challenge Areas</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn">4</div><div class="m-nl">Prizes</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Event Overview</h2>
    <p>The AI Ethics Hackathon is a weekend-long event focusing on the ethical dimensions of artificial intelligence development. Participants will explore responsible AI design, bias detection and mitigation, and creating AI systems that prioritize human values and well-being.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Challenge Areas</h2>
    <p class="sub">Teams will choose one of the following challenge areas to address during the hackathon.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Bias Detection & Mitigation</h3><p>Develop tools to identify and reduce bias in AI systems</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Explainable AI</h3><p>Create methods to make AI decision-making more transparent and understandable</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Privacy-Preserving AI</h3><p>Design AI systems that protect user privacy by default</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>AI Safety</h3><p>Build safeguards to prevent AI misuse or unintended consequences</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Inclusive AI Design</h3><p>Ensure AI systems work effectively for diverse populations</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Schedule</h2>
    <h3>Day 1 (July 18)</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto 2rem;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>08:30 - 09:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Registration and Morning Coffee</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>09:30 - 10:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Opening Keynote: "The Ethical Imperative in AI Development"</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>10:30 - 11:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Challenge Introduction and Team Formation</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>11:30 - 12:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Expert Panel: "Current Challenges in AI Ethics"</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>13:30 - 18:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Hackathon Session</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>19:00 - 20:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Evening Workshop: "Ethics by Design Methodologies"</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>20:00 - 22:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Extended Hacking (Optional)</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <h3>Day 2 (July 19)</h3>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>09:00 - 10:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Breakfast and Daily Kickoff</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>10:00 - 12:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Continued Hackathon Session</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>13:30 - 15:00</h4><div class="up-meta">Final Development Sprint</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>15:30 - 17:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Team Presentations (5 minutes each)</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>17:30 - 18:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Judging and Community Voting</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>18:30 - 19:30</h4><div class="up-meta">Awards Ceremony and Closing Remarks</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Evaluation Criteria</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-heart" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Ethical Impact</h4><div class="up-meta">Effectiveness in addressing ethical challenges in AI</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-lightbulb" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Innovation</h4><div class="up-meta">Uniqueness and creativity of the approach</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-code-slash" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Technical Implementation</h4><div class="up-meta">Quality of the technical solution</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-check2-circle" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Practicality</h4><div class="up-meta">Feasibility for real-world implementation</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;"><i class="bi bi-easel" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i></div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Presentation</h4><div class="up-meta">Clarity and effectiveness of the final presentation</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Prizes</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>First Place</h3><p>Cash prize and mentorship with Ethics in AI Institute</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Second Place</h3><p>Prize and specialized AI ethics training packages</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Third Place</h3><p>Prize and conference tickets to AI Ethics Summit</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-6"><div class="pg-card"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>People's Choice</h3><p>Prize and featured profile in AI Ethics Newsletter</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Who Should Participate</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">AI developers and data scientists</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Ethics researchers and philosophers</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">UX/UI designers focused on human-centered design</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Policy and governance specialists</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Students in computer science, ethics, or related fields</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><div class="up-meta">Anyone interested in the ethical implications of AI technology</div></div></div>
    </div>

    <h2 style="margin-top:3rem;">Registration Information</h2>
    <p>Registration required. Early registration is recommended as spaces are limited to 80 participants. Teams of 3-5 are recommended, but individual registrations are also welcome - we'll help match you with a team.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Frequently Asked Questions</h2>
    <div style="max-width:700px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What technical skills do I need to participate?</h4><div class="up-meta">Teams benefit from a mix of technical and non-technical backgrounds. While programming experience is valuable, expertise in ethics, design, policy, and user experience are equally important for creating well-rounded solutions.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Do I need to have my own project idea?</h4><div class="up-meta">While you're welcome to come with ideas, we'll provide detailed challenge briefs and mentors will help teams refine their concepts during the initial phase of the hackathon.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>What resources will be provided?</h4><div class="up-meta">Participants will have access to computing resources, datasets, AI ethics frameworks, and mentorship from experts in both AI technology and ethics.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Is there a participation fee?</h4><div class="up-meta">Yes, there is a nominal registration fee (reduced rate for students). This covers all meals, resources, and materials during the event.</div></div></div>
      <div class="up-item"><div style="flex-grow:1;"><h4>Can I participate remotely?</h4><div class="up-meta">This hackathon is primarily designed as an in-person event to facilitate collaboration and meaningful discussions. However, limited remote participation options may be available - please contact us for details.</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Related Events -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:5rem 0;">
  <div class="container" style="max-width:800px;">
    <h2>Related Events</h2>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Cybersecurity Hackathon</h3><p>48-hour challenge for security enthusiasts</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-6">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/space-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card" style="overflow:hidden;">
            <img src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" style="width:100%; height:160px; object-fit:cover;">
            <div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Space Hackathon</h3><p>Innovating for space exploration</p></div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Shape the Future of Ethical AI</h2>
    <p>Join us for a weekend of innovation and collaboration to make AI technology more ethical, transparent, and beneficial for everyone.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="color:#fff !important;">Early Registration</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
